name: Text-to-speech snippet
description: Take a short paragraph and synthesise it to a WAV file using the local text_to_speech tool.
prerequisites: First run downloads ~5.5 GB of TTS model weights to <Storage>/models/qwen-tts/.
text_to_speech requires approval by default — use the Direct Invoke surface for non-interactive runs, or disable approval on the agent profile used by this job.

defaultJob.name: Text to speech — sample snippet
defaultJob.prompt: Call text_to_speech with the following text and write the WAV result to c:\temp\tts\sample.wav: 'Hello from OpenClawNet. This is a short text-to-speech sample produced by the local text_to_speech tool. Replace this text with whatever you want to synthesise.'
